test_cases.description: No conflicts — completely new individuals with no existing graph presence
test_cases.pass_criteria: No conflicts detected — recommendation is PROCEED

test_cases.description: Directorship overlap — director of new client is already director of existing client
test_cases.pass_criteria: Detects directorship overlap and flags conflict

test_cases.description: UBO overlap — UBO of new client is UBO of existing client
Prior conflict flag — individual has CONFLICTS_WITH edge in graph
test_cases.pass_criteria: Detects pre-existing conflict flag — recommendation is BLOCK

test_cases.description: Fuzzy name match — name variant matches existing individual
test_cases.pass_criteria: Fuzzy match against 'Robert James Smith' is detected and flagged

test_cases.description: Multiple conflicts — director overlaps with 2 different existing clients
test_cases.pass_criteria: Returns all conflicts — not just the first one found

test_cases.description: No directors or UBOs provided — should reject
test_cases.pass_criteria: Validation error — at least one director or UBO required

test_cases.description: Audit log verification — every check must produce audit_log_ref
test_cases.pass_criteria: audit_log_ref present and requires_human_review is always true
